synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-50068 Oracle Linux 10 bootc bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50068
description:
[1.8.0-2.0.2]
- Also add image-builder helper scripts and configs

[1.8.0-2.0.1]
- Add bootc-oraclelinux-configs
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50068

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50068.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
bootc-1.8.0-2.0.2.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
bootc-oraclelinux-configs-1.8.0-2.0.2.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
system-reinstall-bootc-1.8.0-2.0.2.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
bootc-1.8.0-2.0.2.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
bootc-oraclelinux-configs-1.8.0-2.0.2.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
system-reinstall-bootc-1.8.0-2.0.2.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/bootc-1.8.0-2.0.2.el10_1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.8.0-2.0.2]
- Also add image-builder helper scripts and configs

[1.8.0-2.0.1]
- Add bootc-oraclelinux-configs
